name: @theorionic/mcp-acp-bridge
description: A stateful Model Context Protocol (MCP) server that acts as a bridge to interact with Agent Client Protocol (ACP) agents.

scripts.build: bun build ./src/index.ts --outdir dist --target node --minify && sed -i '1i#!/usr/bin/env node' dist/index.js && chmod +x dist/index.js
scripts.start: if [ -f dist/index.js ]; then node dist/index.js; elif command -v bun > /dev/null; then bun run src/index.ts; else npx tsx src/index.ts; fi

author: theorionic
